item.title: The42_ie: Declan Bogue reposteó The42.ie @The42_ie · 49min NEW POD: Who will survive Munster? And six forwards who can define the
item.description:
Declan Bogue reposteó The42.ie @The42_ie · 49min NEW POD: Who will survive Munster? And six forwards who can define the Championship
@fotoole13 and @DeclanBogue join @RonanEarly to preview the hurling Championship. De the42.ie 2 942

item.title: SmallerFishGAA: Smaller Fish @SmallerFishGAA · 22min I chatted to Jack O'Connor & Charlie Mitchel at the launch of the Leinster hurling
item.description:
Smaller Fish @SmallerFishGAA · 22min I chatted to Jack O'Connor & Charlie Mitchel at the launch of the Leinster hurling championship
I spoke to Jack about getting back to fitness, being captain/waterboy, lads missing & could Rory return
I spoke to Charlie about his heart condition, if we'd see him this year & Mostrar más 1 685

item.title: officialgaa: The GAA @officialgaa · 1h INTERVIEW: It has been a tough few months being unable to play sport for Charlie Mitchell. Th
item.description: The GAA @officialgaa · 1h INTERVIEW: It has been a tough few months being unable to play sport for Charlie Mitchell. The @Offaly_GAA hurling captain discusses returning to light training, the hard work being carried out in the county, and trying to make an impact in the @gaaleinster SHC #GAA Mostrar más 1 1 mil
